requirement_topic.en: Tracking Labels and Product Registration Cards
requirement_topic.zh: 追溯标签与产品登记卡
requirement_topic.zht: 追溯標籤與產品登記卡

summary.en: CPSIA Section 14(a)(5) (15 U.S.C. § 2063(a)(5)) requires manufacturers of children's products (including toys) to place a permanent, distinguishing mark on each product and its packaging (where practicable) that allows the product to be tracked and identified. The tracking label must include: the manufacturer's name; the location and date of manufacture; cohort or batch information (e.g., lot or serial number); and any other information the manufacturer determines is helpful in facilitating a recall. The CPSC's implementing regulation is 16 CFR Part 1130 (Requirements for Consumer Registration of Durable Nursery Products), but tracking labels are required by statute for all children's products, not only durable nursery products. For durable infant and toddler products (cribs, play yards, strollers, car seats etc.), manufacturers must also provide product registration cards and maintain a product registration database.
summary.zh: CPSIA第14(a)(5)条（15 U.S.C. § 2063(a)(5)）要求儿童产品（含玩具）制造商在每件产品及其包装上（在可行的情况下）标注永久性的区分标记，以实现产品追溯和识别。追溯标签须包含：制造商名称；生产地点和日期；批次信息（如批号或序列号）；以及制造商认为有助于实施召回的其他信息。CPSC的实施性法规为16 CFR第1130部分（耐用婴幼儿产品消费者登记要求），但依照法律规定，所有儿童产品而非仅耐用婴幼儿产品均须设置追溯标签。对于耐用婴幼儿产品（婴儿床、游戏床、婴儿车、儿童安全座椅等），制造商还须提供产品登记卡并维护产品登记数据库。
summary.zht: CPSIA第14(a)(5)條（15 U.S.C. § 2063(a)(5)）要求兒童產品（含玩具）製造商在每件產品及其包裝上（在可行的情況下）標注永久性的區分標記，以實現產品追溯和識別。追溯標籤須包含：製造商名稱；生產地點和日期；批次信息（如批號或序列號）；以及製造商認為有助於實施召回的其他信息。CPSC的實施性法規為16 CFR第1130部分（耐用嬰幼兒產品消費者登記要求），但依照法律規定，所有兒童產品而非僅耐用嬰幼兒產品均須設置追溯標籤。對於耐用嬰幼兒產品（嬰兒床、遊戲床、嬰兒車、兒童安全座椅等），製造商還須提供產品登記卡並維護產品登記數據庫。

standards_or_laws: CPSIA Section 14(a)(5) (15 U.S.C. § 2063(a)(5)) — Tracking label requirement for children's products
16 CFR Part 1130 — Requirements for consumer registration of durable infant or toddler products (registration card + database; subset of children's products)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the US CPSIA tracking label requirement. Chinese toys are subject to CCC labelling requirements, which mandate the CCC mark, manufacturer name, factory registration number, product name, and model number on the product or packaging. China's General Administration of Customs and SAMR require manufacturer and country-of-origin markings for exported goods (Customs Law), but there is no statutory obligation for batch-level traceability tracking labels comparable to CPSIA Section 14(a)(5). China's product recall regulations (SAMR Order No. 61, 2020) impose post-market recall obligations but do not require pre-market tracking labels equivalent to the CPSIA requirement.
summary.zh: 中国没有与美国CPSIA追溯标签要求直接对应的规定。中国玩具须符合CCC标志标注要求，包括在产品或包装上标注CCC标志、制造商名称、工厂登记编号、产品名称及型号。中国海关总署和国家市场监督管理总局要求出口商品标注制造商及原产地（海关法），但没有与CPSIA第14(a)(5)相当的法定批次级别追溯标签义务。中国产品召回法规（市场监督管理总局令第61号，2020年）规定了市场后召回义务，但不要求与CPSIA要求相当的售前追溯标签。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與美國CPSIA追溯標籤要求直接對應的規定。中國玩具須符合CCC標誌標注要求，包括在產品或包裝上標注CCC標誌、製造商名稱、工廠登記編號、產品名稱及型號。中國海關總署和國家市場監督管理總局要求出口商品標注製造商及原產地（海關法），但沒有與CPSIA第14(a)(5)相當的法定批次級別追溯標籤義務。中國產品召回法規（市場監督管理總局令第61號，2020年）規定了市場後召回義務，但不要求與CPSIA要求相當的售前追溯標籤。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification marking requirements (CNCA) — manufacturer name, factory code, CCC mark on product/packaging
PRC Customs Law — country-of-origin and manufacturer markings for exports
SAMR Order No. 61 (2020) — Consumer product recall regulations (post-market, not pre-market tracking labels)

gap.en: US tracking labels require batch-level information (date of manufacture, location, lot/serial number) permanently marked on the product itself or its packaging. Chinese CCC labelling does not typically include batch-level traceability information at this granularity. Exporters must implement a tracking label programme that: (a) permanently marks each product unit with manufacturer name, production location, and date/lot/batch; (b) ensures the same information appears in the CPC; and (c) for durable infant/toddler products, includes a registration card and CPSC-registered recall database. This is primarily a production control and labelling design gap, not a standard test gap.
gap.zh: 美国追溯标签要求在产品本体或包装上永久标注批次级信息（生产日期、地点、批号/序列号）。中国CCC标注通常不包含此类粒度的批次级可追溯信息。出口商须建立追溯标签管理程序：（a）在每件产品上永久标注制造商名称、生产地点及日期/批次/批号；（b）确保CPC中包含相同信息；（c）对于耐用婴幼儿产品，附带登记卡并在CPSC召回数据库中登记。这主要是生产管控和标签设计方面的差距，而非标准检测方面的差距。
gap.zht: 美國追溯標籤要求在產品本體或包裝上永久標注批次級信息（生產日期、地點、批號/序列號）。中國CCC標注通常不包含此類粒度的批次級可追溯信息。出口商須建立追溯標籤管理程序：（a）在每件產品上永久標注製造商名稱、生產地點及日期/批次/批號；（b）確保CPC中包含相同信息；（c）對於耐用嬰幼兒產品，附帶登記卡並在CPSC召回數據庫中登記。這主要是生產管控和標籤設計方面的差距，而非標準檢測方面的差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CPSIA Section 14(a)(5) (15 U.S.C. § 2063(a)(5)) for all children's products including toys; 16 CFR Part 1130 additionally for durable infant/toddler products
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — CCC marking required (manufacturer name, CCC mark, model) but no batch-level tracking label statute equivalent to CPSIA 14(a)(5)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CPSIA tracking labels are mandatory for all children's products sold in the US, including toys. The label must be permanent and on the product (not only the outer box). Chinese CCC labelling does not satisfy this requirement. Exporters must design a batch-tracking label system before US market entry and include tracking label information in their CPC.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】CPSIA追溯标签对在美销售的所有儿童产品（含玩具）为强制要求。标签须为永久性标注，位于产品本体（而非仅外包装箱）上。中国CCC标注不满足该要求。出口商须在进入美国市场前设计批次追溯标签系统，并在CPC中包含追溯标签信息。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】CPSIA追溯標籤對在美銷售的所有兒童產品（含玩具）為強制要求。標籤須為永久性標注，位於產品本體（而非僅外包裝箱）上。中國CCC標注不滿足該要求。出口商須在進入美國市場前設計批次追溯標籤系統，並在CPC中包含追溯標籤信息。

source.publisher: U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) — Tracking Labels
